title: TOPDON Thermal Camera TC002C for IOS 15/16 with Type-C Port, 512x384 TISR Resolution, -20-550℃, 25Hz, Video Recording, Infrared Test Report for Electric, House Maintenance, Pest lnspection
features: Designed for iPhone Users -- The TOPDON TC002C thermal imaging camera is designed to work seamlessly with the latest Apple devices, including iPhone 15/16 series and Type-C iPads. Also equipped with a lighting cable to meet the demands of the lighting devices. NOT compatible with Android or Mac devices.

Various Applications -- TC002C thermal imager allows you to measure temperature differences from a safe distance of up to 16.4ft (5m), making it an ideal tool for home inspectors, HVAC technicians, electricians, beekeepers, automotive technicians, and even farmers looking to protect crops and livestock. Also a fun tool in teaching, pet finding, or engaging in various other activities.

Superior Image Quality -- Thanks to the TISR technology, the thermal resolution has been greatly enhanced from 256*192 to 512*384, offering clear thermal images and a high heat sensitivity of 40mK. 25Hz refresh rate ensures smooth temperature readings, and the rotatable design provides precise visuals from any angle.

Extensive Temperature Range -- TC002C thermal camera can detect temperatures ranging from -20 to +550℃ with the maximum error of ±2℃or 2% and accuracy of up to 0.1℃. It supports photo and video recording and allows you to view real-time temperature variations through waveform change and customizable color displays. The high and low temperature auto detection function helps you quickly identify the problem.

Plug And Play Design -- Say goodbye to cable trouble and bulky power. Just plug-and-play to open a new thermal world! The low power consumption of 0.35W ensures extended usage with 6-8 hours for iPhone and 8-10 hours for iPad on a full charge. The compact dimensions of 71x42x14 mm and a weight of 30g allow this pocket-sized infrared camera to be effortlessly portable.
description: Product Description The thermal imager is applicable for iPhone 15 & 16 Series and Type-C iPads, ensuring compatibility with the latest Apple devices.
